en.text: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5676 {properly, a region across; but used only adverbially (with or without a preposition) on the opposite side (especially of the Jordan; ususally meaning the east)}

senses.gloss_en: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5676 {properly, a region across; but used only adverbially (with or without a preposition) on the opposite side (especially of the Jordan; ususally meaning the east)}
